DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Solvej Rose, Esq. of Crow & Rose (415-552-9060), for Cherissa Dyas, Defendant and moving party.
David Wasserman, Esq. (415-567-9600), for 200 Arguello Associates, LLC, Plaintiff and opposing party.
Reporter Mark W. Banta, CSR #6034, (888-575-3376).

In pertaining to the tentative ruling, Court indicates that The SF Rent Board should make the determination. Defendant and moving party submits to the tentative ruling. Plaintiff opposes and orally argues that the case cited (Delaura v. Beckett) in the tentative ruling is a state law statute. Defendant responds to the opposition.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments rules as follows: DEFENDANTs CHERISSA DYAS, JOHN ATWATER and DIANE NELSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken under submission. Defendant submits proposed order in open court for review. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Reporter Mark W. Banta, CSR #6034, (888-575-3376), D501.
